runTitle: Production QA - v8.11.143 Score Deduction Closure
coveredSurfaces: Mobile custom 404 console and tap-target recheck
Score deduction follow-up closure for mobile matrix, AI Assistant, and CSS preload warning

expertAssessments.rationale: Mobile /privacy, /login, and custom 404 recheck showed no horizontal overflow, no small tap-target findings, and no visible layout regression after the link target adjustments.
The prior missing mobile and AI Assistant coverage was closed by QA-20260513-0493, and this release-facing recheck confirmed the deployed CSS warning/tap-target fix.
QA-20260513-0493 exercised the AI Assistant sidebar standard five-question flow with 5/5 pass before this closure deployment.
GitLab tag pipeline 2521039196 succeeded, Vercel serves v8.11.143, Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00459-5gg is deployed, and Vercel billed usage remains 0.0000 USD.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after v8.11.143 score deduction closure QA; current billing period effective=7.3966 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=6699.

completedImprovements.title: Close frontend score deduction follow-up gaps
completedImprovements.evidence: QA-20260513-0493 plus v8.11.143 post-deploy Playwright recheck
completedImprovements.note: Mobile matrix and AI Assistant gap were verified; CSS preload warning root cause was fixed by disabling non-critical Link prefetch and enlarging small text tap targets.

notes: The only console signal on the deliberate 404 route was the expected 404 resource entry.
/login still has the landing-effects.css preload because that route uses the style; no unused-preload warning was observed.
This targeted run closes the prior score deductions but does not replace a future broad production QA matrix.
